releaseNotes: Full D-pad navigation inside About and Update dialogs on Android TV
D-pad Down scrolls release notes, then moves to Update Now button
D-pad Up from buttons scrolls back to notes area
Fixed About dialog Close button not responding on Android TV remotes
Fixed D-pad escaping all modal dialogs to background channel rows
Fixed Android TV launcher banner stretching
Update check now delayed to 30 seconds for slower TV devices
